headline: Stryker (SYK) Expands Digital Healthcare Push with New SmartHospital Platform
summary: Stryker Corporation (NYSE:SYK) is included among the 14 Stocks on the Verge of Becoming Dividend Aristocrats. On March 9, Stryker Corporation (NYSE:SYK) announced the launch of its SmartHospital Platform. The system is designed to connect hospital devices, data, and care teams within one integrated ecosystem. The company introduced the platform ahead of the HIMSS Global […]
